title: Slightly Smaller Spear
description: You think spears are ugly, I think the same way, make them shorter and smaller.
body:
Agreed, Minecraft spears are ugly, wish they never existed but now that they do, use this resource pack to make the tip slightly smaller and the rod (the wooden handle) shorter, it also makes it smaller in the hot-bar so it does not feel like a giant item.

- Less screen coverage.
- Different aesthetic.
- Realistic aesthetic.
